summary: M379 — News index page rebuilt to use live data: now fetches news.json (12 entries with current SEO titles) instead of hardcoded markup that was missing post-overhaul-update + showed stale 'Re-redesign — SpriteCook' / 'M79 Redesign Report' titles. Palette aligned to the new ember accent (--accent-text #ffa844 for ≥4.5:1 contrast). Cards are now real anchors with hover state (border + h2 underline).
